home.metaDesc: Curated seasonal anime, trending series, and top movies.
home.editorialBody: A short reading list for the season — titles that trade spectacle for patience, and the restraint that lets the rest land harder.

myList.metaDesc: Your personal anime watchlist and favorites.
myList.title: My list
myList.loginPrompt: Please log in to view your list.
myList.subtitleDefault: Manage and track your anime journey across all formats.
myList.emptyBody: Browse the home page and add a few series or films.

profile.bioDefault: No bio yet — tell the chronicle what you are watching.
profile.streakBodyNone: Log an update to start a streak.
profile.activityEmpty: Add anime to your list to start tracking updates.
profile.reviewsEmpty: Share your thoughts on finished shows to build your review shelf.
profile.favoritesEmpty: Mark a completed anime as favorite to feature it here.
profile.favoriteCharactersEmpty: Mark a character as favorite to feature them here.

danger.title: Delete account
danger.body: Permanently remove your account and every list, rating, review, and favourite tied to it. This can't be undone.
danger.confirmBody: To continue, type "{username}" below. Your data will be deleted within seconds and you'll be signed out.
danger.failed: Deletion failed. Try again, or contact support.
danger.manualTitle: Automated deletion is not yet available
danger.manualBody: This instance hasn't been configured for self-service deletion. Request removal via the privacy page — your account will be erased manually within 30 days, as required by GDPR.

privacy.metaDesc: How AnimeLegacy stores your data and how to exercise your GDPR rights.
privacy.title: Your data, on your terms.
privacy.dataBody: When you use AnimeLegacy, the following personal data is created and tied to your account:

dataList.account: Email address and authentication record (Firebase Auth).
dataList.list: Every anime you add to your list, along with its status, progress, rating, and review.
dataList.activity: A timeline of changes you make to your list (status updates, ratings, reviews).
dataList.profile: Your username, bio, avatar (stored as a data URL inside your own user document).

privacy.storageBody: All personal data is stored in Google Firestore (Firebase) under your user ID. Anime catalogue entries and global character favourite counters are shared across users and contain no personal data. Anonymous analytics are collected by Vercel Analytics.
privacy.rightsBody: You can at any time request:

rightsList.access: A copy of the personal data we hold about you.
rightsList.rectify: Correction of inaccurate data (most fields you can already edit in your profile).
rightsList.erase: Complete erasure of your account and all associated data.
rightsList.export: An export of your list and ratings in JSON format.

privacy.contactBody: If the self-service deletion in your profile is unavailable, send an email from the address tied to your account. Include your username. We'll confirm once the data has been removed.
privacy.slaNote: We respond within 30 days, in line with GDPR Article 17.

search.startBody: Type a title in the top bar above to search thousands of anime series and films.
search.foundBody: {n} results found. Filter, sort, and add to your list in one place.
search.emptyBody: Try a different title, or check your spelling.

movies.metaDesc: Cinematic anime films curated for your next watch night.
movies.subtitle: The most celebrated anime films, from timeless classics to recent masterpieces. Click any title to add it to your list.
movies.emptyBody: The Jikan API is not responding. Try again in a moment.

character.favoriteHintOff: Mark to feature on your profile.

characters.metaDesc: Browse the most popular anime characters by fan favorites.
characters.subtitle: The most favorited characters across every anime ever catalogued. Click for bios, appearances, and voice actors.
characters.emptyBody: The Jikan API is not responding. Try again in a moment.

voices.metaDesc: Most favorited voice actors and their work.
voices.subtitle: The most beloved seiyuu and international voice actors. Click through for their filmography and roles.
voices.emptyBody: The Jikan API is not responding. Try again in a moment.

voice.notFoundBody: This voice actor could not be loaded.

studios.metaDesc: Browse the studios behind your favorite anime.
studios.subtitle: Every animation house catalogued — ranked by fan favorites. Click through for their signature works.
studios.emptyBody: The Jikan API is not responding. Try again in a moment.

studio.notFoundBody: This studio could not be loaded.

calendar.metaDesc: Weekly broadcast schedule for currently airing anime.
calendar.title: Simulcast calendar
calendar.countBody: {n} simulcasts airing this week, shown in your local timezone.
calendar.unavailable: Broadcast schedule is currently unavailable. Try again in a few minutes.
calendar.tzNote: Times shown in your local timezone · hover for JST

seasonsPage.metaDesc: Every season's anime lineup by year, curated for easy discovery.
seasonsPage.subtitle: Browse every winter, spring, summer, and fall release with filters for genre, format, and sort.
seasonsPage.emptyBody: Try removing a filter or switching seasons.

auth.heroEyebrow: EVERY TITLE · EVERY EPISODE · EVERY SEASON
auth.heroBody: Track what you're watching, what you loved, and what's next — with the care a serious catalogue deserves.
auth.signInTitle: Pick up where you left off.
auth.signInBody: Your list, progress, favorites, and ratings — synced across every device.
auth.signUpBody: A free account gives you a personal list, rating tools, and weekly seasonal recaps.
auth.legal: Your list, ratings, and progress are stored securely against your account.
auth.forgotBody: Enter the email tied to your account and we will send a reset link.
auth.resetBodyDefault: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in…
auth.emailSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
auth.completeProfileBody: Add a username, bio, and avatar to finish setup.

rating.title: Rate & Review
rating.reviewPlaceholder: Share what you thought about the story, characters, and pacing…

addToList.progressHelperKnown: Progress is capped by total episodes.
addToList.progressHelperUnknown: Total episodes unknown. You can update this later.
addToList.airingWarning: This title is still airing, so it cannot be marked as Completed yet.

collections.title: Collections are coming.
collections.body: Hand-picked editorial lists — seasons worth revisiting, underrated gems, director retrospectives. Not auto-generated.
collections.bullet2: Editorial notes on why each entry belongs
collections.bullet3: Save any collection to your list in one click
collections.meta: Curated anime collections — coming soon to AnimeLegacy.

compare.title: Compare lists — soon.
compare.body: See what you and a friend have both watched, what they loved and you missed, and the overlap between your taste profiles.
compare.bullet1: Diff two users' lists side by side
compare.bullet2: Highlight titles only one of you has scored
compare.bullet3: Spot shared favorites and blind spots
compare.meta: Compare your anime list with friends — coming soon.

errorBoundary.title: Something broke.
errorBoundary.body: We hit an error rendering this screen. Refreshing usually fixes it. If it keeps happening, let us know.
